title: Automation - when group created then create widget (chart)
excerpt: Automation to create charts based on the creation of a group on the board.  When new group created on board, the data from specified columns is automatically created on the dashboard in a chart (automation to specify whi…

posts.author: Jobee (Jo Bramham)
posts.cookedHtml: Automation to create charts based on the creation of a group on the board. When new group created on board, the data from specified columns is automatically created on the dashboard in a chart (automation to specify which type of chart). This would allow reporting of averages from high volumes of form responses/items on the board as they are categorised into groups without creating extra boards!
